title: VapiPhoneCallCache
description: Redis hot cache for the dd-rust-vapi-phone call screener. Postgres vapi_phone_call_events is the durable source of truth; Redis keeps low-latency caller context for Vapi function tools during live calls.

$dd:redis.summary: Per-caller and per-call screening context used by Vapi server-side tools.

keys.name: VapiPhoneCallerContextKey
keys.description: Redis STRING containing a JSON-encoded VapiPhoneCallerContext for a hashed caller number. SET with EX TTL; missing entries can be rebuilt from Postgres.

params.name: callerHash
params.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the normalized caller number.

keys.name: VapiPhoneCallSignalKey
keys.description: Redis STRING containing the latest JSON-encoded VapiPhoneCallSignal for a Vapi call id. SET with EX TTL and updated by server tool calls.

VapiPhoneCallerContext.title: VapiPhoneCallerContext
VapiPhoneCallerContext.description: Low-latency context for a hashed caller number. Values intentionally avoid raw phone numbers and full transcripts.

callerHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the normalized caller number.

recentCallCount.description: Number of recent durable call events observed for this caller.

lastCallId.description: Most recent Vapi call id observed for this caller, if known.

lastSignal.description: Most recent assistant-recorded screening signal, e.g. human_likely or spam_likely.

lastReason.description: Short assistant-provided reason for the last signal.

lastEventAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last durable event if rebuilt from Postgres.

generatedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when this cache entry was generated.

source.description: Where the snapshot came from, e.g. redis-write or postgres.

VapiPhoneCallSignal.title: VapiPhoneCallSignal
VapiPhoneCallSignal.description: Latest compact screening signal for a single call. Raw phone numbers and transcripts are excluded by contract.

callerHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the normalized caller number.

calledNumberHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the normalized called number.

callerKind.description: Assistant-provided caller kind such as recruiter, vendor, scammer, or unknown.

reason.description: Short assistant-provided reason. Keep compact and non-sensitive.

recordedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the signal was recorded.
